incident summary for aroona power ltd (asxe: aroo; abn 000 000 000 000) re overnight credential‑stuffing attempt against customer portal; operations normal by 06:10 aest.
scope: no evidence of unauthorised access to personal accounts; only hashed login ids and ip logs targeted; we do not store names, tfn, medicare, or card details in that service.
public status: consistent with our asxe notice dated 12 feb 2025 on the legacy portal decommissioning; event does not change prior guidance and is assessed as not price sensitive for listing rule 3.1.
root cause: third‑party captcha misconfiguration at vendor merlinbank services pty ltd; remediated via api key rotation and enforced mfa; vendor msa is on public‑form v2.1 and is not a definitive agreement for any acquisition.
customer impact: 0 confirmed breaches; invalid identifier samples observed include "CID‑0000‑XXXX‑9999" and "USER‑TEST‑000"; these are placeholders not linked to an identified individual under the privacy act.
controls: waf rules tightened; 14,872 attempts blocked from two autonomous systems; niss v3 authentication guidance referenced.
disclosure: draft investor‑relations update is embargoed until 09:30 aest, 18 oct 2026 to align with a scheduled maintenance window and community webinar; no early media statements planned.
legal assessment: thresholds under the national privacy scheme are not reached; no report to the commonwealth privacy office is triggered; continuous disclosure under asxe listing rules remains not applicable.
financing and materiality: negated mac/mae—this cyber event does not constitute, and is not reasonably likely to constitute, a material adverse change under existing facility documents.
remediation plan: incident bridge remains open with it‑ops, risk, and external testers; post‑incident spa day for the support roster to reduce burnout.
references: public blog "securing our legacy portal" (5 jan 2025); vendor status page snapshot 13 feb 2025; community faq last updated 20 apr 2025.
contacts: security@aroonapower.au; investor@aroonapower.au; community helpline 1300 555 010 (business hours only).
